languages.text: "Иными словами, станция в каком-то смысле является колоссальных размеров аугментом. Любопытный эксперимент, но я уверен, что нашел бы способ сотворить подобное более изящно".

"In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."
languages.original_text: "Иными словами, станция в каком-то смысле является колоссальных размеров аугментом. Любопытный эксперимент, но я уверен, что нашел бы способ сотворить подобное более изящно".

traits.locale_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmentic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

"In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmentic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

"In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

languages.text: "Anders gesagt ist die Station sozusagen eine Augmentation kolossalen Ausmaßes. Ein seltsames Experiment, aber ich bin mir sicher, dass ich mit einer eleganteren Methode zum selben Ergebnis kommen könnte."
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: "Anders gesagt ist die Station sozusagen eine Augmentation kolossalen Ausmaßes. Ein seltsames Experiment, aber ich bin mir sicher, dass ich mit einer eleganteren Methode zum selben Ergebnis kommen könnte."

languages.text: “也就是说，某种意义上，这座星站即是一个庞大无比的植入物。有意思的实验，不过，我有信心设计出更巧妙的方法来达到同样的效果。”
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: “也就是说，某种意义上，这座星站即是一个庞大无比的植入物。有意思的实验，不过，我有信心设计出更巧妙的方法来达到同样的效果。”

languages.text: « Autrement dit, la station est un genre d'augmétique colossal. C'est une expérience curieuse, mais je suis certain que je pourrais arriver au même résultat d'une manière plus élégante. »
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: « Autrement dit, la station est un genre d'augmétique colossal. C'est une expérience curieuse, mais je suis certain que je pourrais arriver au même résultat d'une manière plus élégante. »

languages.text: «En otras palabras, este puesto es, por así decirlo, un aumento de proporciones colosales. Un experimento curioso, aunque no me cabe duda de que yo podría idear un método más elegante para alcanzar el mismo fin».
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: «En otras palabras, este puesto es, por así decirlo, un aumento de proporciones colosales. Un experimento curioso, aunque no me cabe duda de que yo podría idear un método más elegante para alcanzar el mismo fin».

languages.text: "Başka bir deyişle istasyon, devasa boyutlarda bir ogmetik sayılır. İlginç bir deney ama aynı amaca ulaşmak için daha zarif bir yöntem tasarlayabileceğimden eminim."
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: "Başka bir deyişle istasyon, devasa boyutlarda bir ogmetik sayılır. İlginç bir deney ama aynı amaca ulaşmak için daha zarif bir yöntem tasarlayabileceğimden eminim."

languages.text: 「言い換えれば、このステーションは、いわば途方もない規模のオーグメティックなのです。興味深い実験ではありますが、同じ目的を達成するのに、私ならばより洗練された手法を考案できると確信しています」
languages.original_text: "In other words, the station is, in a manner of speaking, an augmetic of colossal proportions. A curious experiment, yet I am confident I could devise a more elegant method of achieving the same end."

traits.locale_text: 「言い換えれば、このステーションは、いわば途方もない規模のオーグメティックなのです。興味深い実験ではありますが、同じ目的を達成するのに、私ならばより洗練された手法を考案できると確信しています」
